title: Gravestone: Herotime
description: Become an Omnitrix Wielder in Minecraft
body: # Gravestone: HeroTime - A Palladium Mod-Addon ![page divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42fb049f2bbd72d6e7ca81ebf8e90ba38696029c.png) HeroTime is a mod for palladium that ultilizes our [Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestone-core) and is loosely based on the show Ben 10, adding the omnitrix into minecraft for the player to use. As of right now there is only the prototype omnitrix but our goal for version 1.0 is to have the recalibrated and evolved omnitrix entirely usable within the survival gameplay! i emplore you to read the wiki or at least watch a video on it because the omnitrix obtainment can be a bit tricky! friends not included.. sorta ![page divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42fb049f2bbd72d6e7ca81ebf8e90ba38696029c.png) ### how to use the omnitrix when you first get the Prototype omnitrix you will be given 10 mostly random aliens (you can choose to get the classic aliens via a config option). ability 1 is to prime the watch, scrolling is done by the mouse wheel, to transform into an alien you must left click putting your hand above the watch (we added this cos deaded is stupid and kept accidentally turning into the wrong alien, its also threatening!) if you picked the wrong alien you can right click and go back to scrolling or left click again to transform! Once transformed at first you are not able to force a timeout and must go the full 5 minutes before reverting back to normal and 2 minutes to time back in but the more you transform the more mastery you get over the watch so I'm sure one day you'll work out how. ![page divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42fb049f2bbd72d6e7ca81ebf8e90ba38696029c.png) ### how to use codes every omnitrix comes with a list of randomized codes, crouching and pressing what would normally be the prime watch button opens the code menu, from there it is lefts and rights (mouse scrolling like with cycling aliens) for code input. codes are 9 digits. current codes: - decouple - master control - self destruct - currently unavailible - core removal - alien unlocking
